goal: Add a side-effect-free handoff-prep builder for BPK-082 approved release governance final decisions, producing operator handoff metadata for a later task while keeping GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, packages, and deployment closed.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or mutate external state.
claims: Approved release governance final decisions can be converted to handoff-prep metadata without executing actions.
Ready BPK-082 final decision gate and handoff prep refs are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual release action and merge require later human/operator tasks.
dod: Approved, missing handoff prep ref, and rejected or blocked final decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-082 converted release governance runbook evidence into a final decision without executing actions.
